one_time_description: Prior period restatement: BC First Nations Gaming revenue was overstated by $306,059 in FY2022; comparative figures restated accordingly.
economic_notes: Band holds 25% interest in Pelltiq't Energy Group and 51% interest in Whispering Pines/A&T Limited Liability Partnership; both excluded from consolidation as management indicates no active operations. Investment in All Nations Trust Company ($90,000) and BC First Nations Gaming Partnership ($110) recorded at cost.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not assessed — impact on expenses, TCA and accumulated surplus is unknown; (2) 25% interest in Pelltiq't Energy Group and 51% interest in Whispering Pines/A&T LLP not recorded as no active operations and no audited financials available. Comparative FY2022 figures restated to remove $306,059 overstatement of BC First Nations Gaming revenue. Only one consolidated subsidiary: Whispering Pines Clinton Indian Band Social Housing. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($1,463,518) + CMHC ($46,387) + Province of BC ($149,149) + FNHA ($90,239) + FNESC ($64,585) + BC First Nations Gaming ($579,244) + Qwemtsin Health Society ($138,542) = $2,531,664 approximate; expenses_housing combines Band Owned Housing ($59,316) and Social Housing ($17,765). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
